{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blackwatch badge
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Blackwatch badge]] is an item [[Calder]] possesses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|People tend to run from anyone with a [[Blackwatch badge]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"Second of all, if I could even walk straight in the door with a Blackwatch badge on, they’re not about to let me walk out with a prisoner."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
